footer.tagline: Helping the world invest in Uzbekistan's digital future.

hero.subtitle: We open Uzbekistan's digital economy to the world — guiding international companies and investors from first meeting to fully operational.

why.label: Why Uzbekistan
why.title: The opportunity is here. So is the timing.
paragraphs: 2025-yilda IT xizmatlari eksporti $1 mlrd dan oshdi; milliy IT Parkda deyarli 3 000 kompaniya ishlaydi. Digital Uzbekistan 2030 — milliy ustuvorlik, institutlar va rag‘batlar bilan mustahkamlangan.
IT Park rezidentlari: 0% korporativ soliq va QQS, 7,5% yagona daromad solig‘i. Yosh, ko‘p tilli kadrlar va bozorga kirishni qo‘llab-quvvatlash erta joylashishni amaliy qiladi.

timeline.label: Our story
timeline.title: From a new office to a national platform.

items.title: The office is established
items.desc: Founded as a structural unit of the Ministry of Digital Technologies to attract investment into the digital sector.

items.title: Record investment
items.desc: Foreign direct investment reaches $11.9 billion, up more than 50 percent year on year.

items.title: A billion in exports
items.desc: IT service exports cross $1 billion for the first time; the IT Park approaches 3,000 companies.

items.title: Landmark deals
items.desc: A $3.5B AI computing centre and a 300 MW national data centre advance with foreign investors.

items.title: The target
items.desc: A national goal of $5 billion in annual digital exports under Digital Uzbekistan 2030.

items.desc: A landmark foreign direct investment with Shanghai Linkwise in Karakalpakstan — AI and intelligent computing capacity, planned for commissioning in 2027.

items.title: 300 MW National Data Centre
items.desc: Large-scale IT capacity — up to 300 MW — to power AI, big data and next-generation digital services across the region.

items.title: Animation & GameDev talent
items.desc: Japan-backed animation training with ELF-IN and a gaming sector that grew exports 21× in three years — an export-ready creative industry.

about.metaDescription: O‘zbekiston Raqamli texnologiyalar vazirligi huzuridagi Investitsiya loyihalari ofisi: vazifalar, tuzilma va jamoa.

hero.title: Investitsiya loyihalari ofisi.
hero.subtitle: O‘zbekiston Respublikasi Raqamli texnologiyalar vazirligining tarkibiy bo‘linmasi. Biz raqamli investitsiyalarni jalb qilamiz va xalqaro kompaniyalarni birinchi aloqadan ishga tushirishgacha kuzatib boramiz.

office.metaDescription: Raqamli texnologiyalar vazirligi huzuridagi Investitsiya loyihalari ofisi: vazifalar, mansublik va bozorga chiqishni qo‘llab-quvvatlash.
office.title: Biz kimiz va nima qilamiz.
office.belongs: Investitsiya loyihalari ofisi O‘zbekiston Respublikasi Raqamli texnologiyalar vazirligi tarkibiga kiradi. U 2023-yilda «Raqamli O‘zbekiston — 2030» strategiyasini amalga oshirish va milliy IT-sektorga investitsiya yo‘laklarini ochish uchun tashkil etilgan.
office.mandate: Bizning vazifamiz — raqamli texnologiyalar sohasiga investitsiya, grant va homiylik mablag‘larini jalb etish hamda O‘zbekiston IT-bozoriga kirayotgan yoki kengayayotgan xorijiy investorlarni qo‘llab-quvvatlash.
office.support: Bozorga chiqishni bosqichma-bosqich kuzatamiz: kompaniyani ro‘yxatdan o‘tkazish, huquqiy va ma’muriy maslahat, yashash va soliq tartiblari, IT Park rezidentligi hamda mahalliy hamkorlar va xizmat ko‘rsatuvchilar bilan tanishtirish.

structure.metaDescription: Investitsiya loyihalari ofisining Raqamli texnologiyalar vazirligidagi tashkiliy tuzilmasi.
structure.title: Ofis vazirlik tuzilmasida qayerda turadi.
structure.intro: Mas’ul shaxs, lavozim va aloqa ma’lumotlarini ko‘rish uchun lavozimni tanlang.

team.metaDescription: Investitsiya loyihalari ofisi rahbariyati va mutaxassislari.
team.title: Siz bilan ishlaydigan mutaxassislar.
team.intro: Jamoamiz investorlar bilan muzokaralar, ikki tomonlama tashriflar va bozorga chiqishni kundalik qo‘llab-quvvatlashni olib boradi.

karimjonov.bio: Investitsiyaga oid raqamli dasturlar va Investitsiya loyihalari ofisi bilan muvofiqlashtirishni nazorat qiluvchi vazir o‘rinbosari.

maxsudov.name: Maxsudov Jamol Tilloyevich
maxsudov.bio: O‘zbekiston Respublikasi Raqamli texnologiyalar vaziri o‘rinbosari.

akramkhujaev.bio: Investitsiya loyihalari ofisini boshqaradi. Xalqaro kompaniyalar va investorlar uchun birinchi uchrashuvdan ishga tushirishgacha asosiy suhbatdosh.

gayratjonov.name: Jamshidbek Gayratjonov
gayratjonov.bio: Raqamli sektorda investitsiya tuzilmasi, grant yo‘llari va homiylik imkoniyatlarini qo‘llab-quvvatlaydi.

inomjonova.name: Diyora Inomjonova
inomjonova.bio: Investor hujjatlari, rasmiy yozishmalar va vazirlik bo‘linmalari bilan ishlashni muvofiqlashtiradi.

khakkiev.name: Samandar Khakkiev
khakkiev.bio: Loyiha portfeli, maydonchalarga tashriflar va bozorga chiqish bosqichlarini boshqaradi.

khamrakulov.name: Khasan Khamrakulov
khamrakulov.bio: Investitsiya loyihalari ofisi va vazirlik bo‘linmalari o‘rtasida tartibga solish va ma’muriy masalalar bo‘yicha aloqani ta’minlaydi.

hero.title: We de-risk your entry into Uzbekistan.
hero.subtitle: One office, from your first question to your first local hire — and long after. We carry the administrative complexity so you can focus on building your business.

items.title: Company registration
items.desc: Fast, guided incorporation of your legal entity, with the right structure for your business and sector.

items.title: Legal & administrative guidance
items.desc: Clear answers on regulation, licensing and compliance for the technology sector.

items.title: Residence & tax procedures
items.desc: Support with tax setup, residence and the IT-Visa for you and your team.

items.title: Local partnerships & matchmaking
items.desc: Warm introductions to vetted local service providers, partners and talent.

items.title: Grants & investment facilitation
items.desc: Guidance on available grants, incentives and co-investment mechanisms in the digital sector.

items.title: Ongoing business support
items.desc: Aftercare that stays with you — hiring, scaling and connecting into the wider ecosystem.

process.title: From first call to fully operational.

steps.title: Discover
steps.desc: We learn your goals and map the fastest, lowest-risk path to the Uzbek market.

steps.title: Structure
steps.desc: We advise on the right legal, tax and visa structure for your business.

steps.title: Establish
steps.desc: We handle registration, licensing and residence so you're operational quickly.

steps.title: Grow
steps.desc: We connect you to talent, partners and incentives — and stay with you as you scale.

programs.title: Purpose-built to bring you in.
programs.intro: Uzbekistan has built a suite of programs specifically to lower the barrier for foreign technology companies entering the market.

items.name: IT Park Zero Risk
items.desc: Residents pay no corporate, VAT or social tax, and a flat 7.5% personal income tax. Companies can be fully registered and operational within weeks of arrival.

items.name: IT-Visa
items.desc: Streamlined residence for IT founders, investors and specialists, valid for up to three years.

items.name: Soft-Landing
items.desc: Practical, hands-on help to get your team on the ground and operational quickly.

items.name: Digital Startups
items.desc: Support pathways and funding routes for scalable digital startups and IT Park residents.

hero.title: Investment projects in Uzbekistan's digital sector.
hero.subtitle: From landmark AI infrastructure to export-oriented delivery and creative industries — a portfolio designed to strengthen the national technology landscape and deliver returns.

portfolio.label: Investment portfolio
portfolio.title: The deals shaping Uzbekistan's digital decade.
portfolio.intro: A record of the investments, partnerships and national programs delivered with the Ministry of Digital Technologies. Select a year to explore, and open any project to read the detail.
portfolio.hint: Select a project to read more

deals.title: Shanghai Linkwise Modular Computing Centre
deals.desc: A $3.5 billion foreign direct investment to build a Modular Intelligent Computing Centre in the Republic of Karakalpakstan, planned for commissioning in 2027 — among the largest technology FDI commitments in the country's history.

deals.title: DataVolt Green Data Centres
deals.desc: Saudi Arabia's DataVolt is developing green data centres in Uzbekistan under a foreign-investment program worth up to $5 billion by 2030. Its first facility, the 12 MW TAS-1 in Tashkent, is fully foreign-financed with $150 million backing from DEG, the EBRD, the OPEC Fund and Proparco.

deals.title: Five Million AI Leaders
deals.desc: A national program launched with the United Arab Emirates to train five million citizens in artificial intelligence by 2030 — 4.75 million students, 150,000 teachers and 100,000 civil servants. More than one million people have already completed basic training.

deals.title: Nvidia Supercomputer Cluster
deals.desc: A major national supercomputer cluster being launched in partnership with Nvidia to power domestic AI development, alongside a National Transfer Office opening in Silicon Valley to connect Uzbek founders with global investors.

deals.title: $1 Billion in IT Service Exports
deals.desc: IT service exports crossed $1 billion for the first time in the country's history, on the path to a national target of $5 billion in annual digital exports by 2030.

deals.title: Japan Animation Talent Initiative
deals.desc: A partnership with Japan's ELF-IN, backed by a grant exceeding $700,000, to train a new generation of animation and computer-graphics professionals and build an export-ready creative industry.

deals.title: ICT Week Investment Forum
deals.desc: Tashkent hosted the IT Investment Forum during ICT Week 2025, convening government leaders, global companies and international investors around Uzbekistan's digital opportunity.

deals.title: Record FDI Inflows
deals.desc: Foreign direct investment reached $11.9 billion, up more than 50% year on year and equal to 10.3% of GDP — a clear signal of rising international confidence in Uzbekistan.

deals.title: DataVolt Green Data Centre Agreement
deals.desc: Uzbekistan signed with Saudi Arabia's DataVolt to develop a network of green data centres, laying the groundwork for a multi-billion-dollar build-out of the country's digital infrastructure.

hero.title: News from the office.
hero.subtitle: Investment, partnerships and momentum from Uzbekistan's digital economy.

items.title: China's Linkwise to build $3.5B AI computing centre
items.excerpt: A Modular Intelligent Computing Centre in Karakalpakstan, delivered as foreign direct investment and planned for commissioning in 2027 — one of the largest tech FDI commitments in the country's history.

items.title: 300 MW data centre to anchor Central Asia's digital hub
items.excerpt: Up to 300 MW of IT capacity for AI and big data, with the first phase beginning in 2026 — more than infrastructure, an innovation ecosystem.

items.title: Uzbekistan and Japan launch Animation Talent Initiative
items.excerpt: A partnership with ELF-IN Co., backed by a grant exceeding $700K, to build a new generation of animation and CG professionals and export Uzbek content globally.

items.title: Ucell powers the next generation of IT talent
items.excerpt: A five-year MOU to accelerate digital education, develop skilled IT professionals and equip young people with future-ready competencies.

items.title: Expanding cooperation with Shanghai's Lingang Technopark
items.excerpt: Talks to attract leading Chinese tech companies to Uzbekistan and launch joint startup hubs with top universities.

items.title: Working visit to Japan: METI, MIC and JICA
items.excerpt: Meetings across Japanese government and industry on AI adoption, IT outsourcing and talent — plus cooperation agreements for IT education and animation.

items.title: Uzbek developers on GitHub grew 10× in five years
items.excerpt: From 25K to 275K developers (2020–2025), with an 8-place climb in the 2025 Government AI Readiness Index.

items.title: ICT Week 2025: IT Investment Forum in Tashkent
items.excerpt: Government leaders, international investors and global companies convened on the future of IT investment in Uzbekistan.

hero.title: Where the Silk Road meets the digital age.
hero.subtitle: For centuries, Uzbekistan connected the world's markets. Today it does so in code. Tell us what you're planning, and we'll map the path to market.

form.name: Full name

form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again, or email us directly at invest@digital.uz.
form.note: We typically reply within a few business days.

channels.title: Direct channels

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
body: This Privacy Policy describes how the Investment Project Office of the Ministry of Digital Technologies of the Republic of Uzbekistan ("we", "us") collects, uses and protects personal information when you visit invest.digital.uz (the "Site") or contact us through the Site.

Who we are. The Investment Project Office is a structural unit of the Ministry of Digital Technologies. Our role is to attract investment, grants and partnerships into Uzbekistan's digital sector and to support foreign technology companies entering and expanding in the market. Contact: invest@digital.uz · Muminov 4/1, Tashkent, Uzbekistan · +998 71 238 41 76.

Information we collect. We collect information you voluntarily provide — typically your name, organisation, email address, phone number, country, sector interest and message when you submit the contact form or email us. We may also receive technical data automatically, such as IP address, browser type, device type, pages visited and approximate location, via server logs and analytics tools.

How we use information. We use personal data to respond to enquiries; arrange discovery calls and follow-up; provide market-entry information and introductions relevant to your request; improve the Site and our services; and comply with applicable legal obligations. We do not sell personal data.

Legal basis and sharing. We process contact and engagement data based on your request to communicate with us and our legitimate interest in fulfilling our public mandate. We share information only with authorised staff and, where necessary to fulfil your request, with relevant government counterparts or vetted service providers under appropriate confidentiality. We do not disclose personal data for unrelated marketing by third parties.

Retention. Enquiry records are kept for as long as needed to manage the relationship and for a reasonable period thereafter for accountability and follow-up, unless a longer period is required by law. Analytics data is retained in aggregated or anonymised form where practicable.

Security and international transfers. We apply organisational and technical measures appropriate to the sensitivity of the data. If information is processed or stored outside Uzbekistan (for example by a hosting or email provider), we take steps to ensure an adequate level of protection consistent with applicable requirements.

Your rights. Subject to applicable law, you may request access to, correction of, or deletion of personal data we hold about you, or object to certain processing. To exercise these rights, email invest@digital.uz with sufficient detail for us to verify and respond to your request.
Cookies. The Site may use essential and analytics cookies. See our Cookie Policy for details and how to manage browser settings.
Children. The Site is intended for professional and business users. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children.

Changes. We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The "Last updated" date at the top of this page reflects the latest revision. Continued use of the Site after changes constitutes notice of the updated policy where permitted by law.
Contact. For privacy questions or requests, write to invest@digital.uz.

whyPage.metaDescription: Economy, talent, innovation, culture, living, and 2030 strategy — why technology investors look at Uzbekistan.
whyPage.title: Why digital Uzbekistan.
whyPage.subtitle: A growing economy, a young STEM workforce, a national digital push, and a country opening to the world.

whyPage.hubIntro: Explore the foundations of Uzbekistan's investment pitch — from the macroeconomy and talent to innovation, culture, living, and the 2030 strategy.
whyPage.sidebarNote: Economy-wide topics beyond the digital sector live on <link>invest.gov.uz</link>.

investorsPage.metaDescription: Where to start, explore digital sectors, priority projects, preferential zones, and public-private partnership — with the Investment Project Office.
investorsPage.title: How to invest in digital Uzbekistan.
investorsPage.subtitle: Five guides for technology companies entering the market — from first conversation to preferential regimes and public-private partnership.

investorsPage.hubIntro: We kept the investor-guide structure investors already know from the national portal, focused on digital and IT Park pathways.
investorsPage.sidebarNote: Economy-wide topics such as privatization, consultants, and bonds live on <link>invest.gov.uz</link>.

whereToStart.metaDescription: Discover, structure, establish and grow — the Investment Project Office path for technology market entry in Uzbekistan.
whereToStart.title: Four stages from first conversation to growth.
whereToStart.subtitle: You do not need to know the full process before contacting us. Bring your goals; we map the path.
whereToStart.pathIntro: Each stage links to the pages and programs you will use most.

zones.metaDescription: IT Park Zero Risk and related preferential regimes for technology companies in Uzbekistan.
zones.title: IT Park is the digital preferential zone.
zones.subtitle: Qualifying residents can operate under 0% corporate tax, 0% VAT, and a flat 7.5% personal income tax — with Soft-Landing and IT-Visa beside the regime.
zones.itParkTitle: Preferential terms built for technology exporters.
zones.itParkIntro: 2,990+ IT Park member companies and $1B+ in IT service exports (2025) sit inside this regime. The office helps you confirm eligibility and sequence residency with incorporation.

highlights.title: 0% corporate income tax
highlights.desc: For qualifying IT Park residents under programme rules.

highlights.title: 7.5% flat personal income tax
highlights.desc: A simple rate for founders and specialists on the regime.

zones.programsTitle: Pair the regime with visas and soft-landing.
zones.programsIntro: Most companies combine IT Park residency with IT-Visa and Soft-Landing support.
zones.nationalNote: Economy-wide free economic zones and special economic zones are covered on <link>invest.gov.uz</link>.

partnership.metaDescription: How technology companies partner with Uzbek ministries and agencies on digital delivery, with IPO support.
partnership.title: Partner with government on digital delivery.
partnership.subtitle: When your model needs a public counterpart — govtech, digital infrastructure, or shared service delivery — we help you frame the conversation and find the right door.
partnership.howIntro: IPO does not replace the formal PPP process for economy-wide infrastructure. We focus on digital and technology partnerships.

stages.title: Frame the concept
stages.desc: Clarify the public problem, your delivery model, and what you need from a ministry or agency.

stages.title: Find the counterpart
stages.desc: We introduce the right digital and sector stakeholders so you are not cold-calling across government.

stages.title: Structure the next step
stages.desc: Pilot, MoU, or formal procurement path — sequenced with Soft-Landing and incentives where they apply.

partnership.fitTitle: Digital partnership models we see most often.
partnership.fitIntro: If your project sits outside digital remits, we point you to the national IPA.

fits.title: Govtech and digital public services
fits.desc: Platforms, identity, payments, and service delivery that need a ministry sponsor.

fits.title: Digital infrastructure
fits.desc: Connectivity, data centres, cloud, and shared platforms with public demand.

fits.title: Skills and digital education
fits.desc: Workforce and education partnerships tied to technology investment.

fits.title: Sector digitization
fits.desc: Fintech, healthtech, and logistics tech that plug into regulated public systems.

partnership.nationalNote: Economy-wide PPP rules, tender stages, and thresholds are published on <link>invest.gov.uz</link>.

styleguide.subtitle: Visual language for the Investment Project Office — colour, type, and components.

facts: Rejalashtirilgan $3,5 mlrd Modular Intelligent Computing Centre maydoni
Yashil data-markazlar uchun qayta tiklanadigan energiya salohiyati
Sanoat loyihalari bilan birga raqamli ko‘nikmalarga e’tibor

xorazm.name: Xorazm
xorazm.description: Markaziy Osiyoni bog‘lovchi tarixiy yo‘lak — raqamli xizmatlar, logistika texnologiyalari va mintaqaviy bog‘liqlikda imkoniyatlar.

Poytaxt hublaridan tashqarida IT xizmatlari o‘sishi uchun joy
Agro-raqam va turizm texnologiyalarida hamkorlik salohiyati

navoiy.name: Navoiy
navoiy.description: Data infratuzilmasi uchun joy va energiya bilan sanoat markazi — compute, sanoat IoT va eksportga yo‘naltirilgan texnologiya operatsiyalari uchun jozibador.
facts: Kuchli sanoat bazasi va energiya infratuzilmasi
Yirik raqamli obyektlar uchun mos
Milliy logistika va xomashyo zanjirlariga yaqinlik

bukhara.name: Buxoro
bukhara.description: Mehmonlar va xizmatlar uchun yangilanayotgan Ipak yo‘li shahri — turizm texnologiyasi, ijodiy raqam va masofaviy jamoalar imkoniyatlari.

Ijodiy va madaniy texnologiyalarga o‘sib borayotgan qiziqish
Mintaqaviy xizmat markazlari uchun soft-landing imkoniyati

samarqand.description: Madaniy poytaxt va o‘sib borayotgan ikkinchi texnologiya tuguni — talent, turizmni raqamlashtirish va Toshkentdan tashqaridagi delivery markazlari.
facts: Kuchli universitet va mutaxassislar oqimi

qashqadaryo.description: Energiya va sanoat raqamli transformatsiya bilan uchrashadi — sanoat dasturi, energiya texnologiyasi va ko‘nikma hamkorliklari.
facts: Energiya sektori raqamli yechimlarga talab yaratadi
Mintaqaviy talent IT autsorsing o‘sishiga tayyor
Sanoat va logistika texnologiyasi uchun infratuzilma

surxondaryo.name: Surxondaryo
surxondaryo.description: O‘zbekistonning janubiy darvozasi — raqamli logistika, chegara xizmatlari va janub-sharqqa qaragan kompaniyalar uchun bog‘liqlik.
facts: Chegara savdosi logistika-tech talabini oshiradi
IT o‘qitish dasturlari uchun yosh ishchi kuchi
Mintaqaviy xizmat yetkazib berishga qiziqish oshmoqda

jizzakh.name: Jizzax
jizzakh.description: Yirik hublar orasidagi ixcham viloyat — o‘rta texnologiya operatsiyalari, industriya parklari va ko‘nikma dasturlari uchun mos.
facts: Toshkent va Samarqand yo‘laklari orasida
Texnologiya ishlab chiqarish uchun industriya park quvvati
Delivery jamoalari uchun raqobatbardosh xarajatlar

sirdaryo.name: Sirdaryo
sirdaryo.description: Poytaxt yo‘lagiga yaqin, sanoat va agro-raqam salohiyati bilan — poytaxt narxlarisiz kengayish uchun amaliy baza.
facts: Toshkent talent va mijozlariga qisqa masofa
Agro-tech va sanoatni raqamlashtirish imkoniyatlari
Sun’iy yo‘ldosh delivery va qo‘llab-quvvatlash markazlari uchun jozibador

tashkent-region.name: Toshkent viloyati
tashkent-region.description: Poytaxt atrofidagi iqtisodiyot — sanoat zonalari, logistika va Toshkent shahri texnologiya o‘sishining toshqinini qabul qiluvchi kampuslar.
facts: Poytaxt yaqinida sanoat va erkin zonalar
Data-markazlar va kampus maydonlari uchun joy
Toshkent spilloveridan chuqur mehnat bozori

tashkent-city.name: Toshkent shahri
tashkent-city.description: Milliy raqamli hub — IT Park, vazirliklar, investorlar va dasturchilar, startaplar hamda xorijiy kompaniya ofislarining eng zich joylashuvi.
facts: IT Park shtab-kvartirasi va flagman rezidentlar jamiyati
Dasturchilar va raqamli talentning eng yuqori zichligi
Soft-landing va davlat bilan ishlashning asosiy nuqtasi

namangan.name: Namangan
namangan.description: Farg‘ona vodiysi talent kamarining qismi — kuchli ishlab chiqarish merosi dasturiy ta’minot, BPO va raqamli ko‘nikmalarga talab bilan uchrashadi.
facts: Farg‘ona vodiysi talent va ishlab chiqarish bazasi
IT ta’lim hamkorliklariga o‘sib borayotgan qiziqish
Toshkentga nisbatan raqobatbardosh delivery xarajati

andijan.name: Andijon
andijan.description: Avtomobil va ishlab chiqarish ildizlariga ega sharqiy sanoat markazi — sanoatni raqamlashtirish, embedded dastur va eksport xizmatlari uchun tayyor.
facts: Avto va sanoat klasterlari raqamli vositalarga muhtoj
Zich aholi va yosh ishchi kuchi
Eksportga yo‘naltirilgan ishlab chiqarish + IT imkoniyati

fergana.name: Farg‘ona
fergana.description: Farg‘ona vodiysi yuragi — eng ko‘p aholili viloyatlardan biri, autsorsing, fintech tarqatish va raqamli ta’lim uchun miqyosga ega.
facts: BPO va dasturiy ta’minot uchun katta mehnat bozori
Andijon va Namangan bilan vodiy bo‘ylab bog‘liqlik
Mintaqaviy IT ta’limiga investitsiya uchun kuchli asos
